case_title: NEXTARTS VS. CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS, BEST BUY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS, BEST BUY
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO BEST BUY, 1717 HARRISION STREET, SAN FRANCISCO CA. 94103
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-26-2016 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $45.00) SERVED AUG-24-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS, BEST BUY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEXTARTS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-26-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-26-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE ANTHONY IMPERIAL, EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR OF NEXTARTS, AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE BRENDAN MCKEON, GENERAL MANAGER FOR BEST BUY. DARRYL MOTLEY, A WITNESS FOR PLAINTIFF, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIEDL PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEXTARTS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS, BEST BUY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $510.00 FILED BY NEXTARTS AS TO DEFENDANT CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS, BEST BUY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2016 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
